_comment: This file is OVERWRITTEN each security review. Do NOT append to it.

ssh_attacks.fail2ban_status: active - sshd jail running, 15 currently banned, 5931 total banned
ssh_attacks.change_since_last: fail2ban total bans 5931 (up from 5870, +61). 15 IPs currently banned (up from 3). 6 currently failed. Brute-force continues at typical rate. Only authorized activity from novakj.

pdf_security.document_write_safe: 1 usage in keyboard-shortcuts.js line 395 — writes to newly opened blank window for print cheat sheet only. All content escaped via escapeHtml(). Acceptable pattern.
pdf_security.innerHTML_note: 157 usages across 41 JS files — all safe: static templates, clearing operations, escaped user data, numeric-only interpolation, blob URLs, hardcoded SVG, or escapeHtml()/escHtml()/escapeAttr() helpers. New modules html-export.js and form-data.js use escapeHtml()/escHtml() for all PDF-extracted and user content.

html_export_task054.feature: TASK-054: Export PDF to HTML with responsive layout, text extraction, image embedding, themes.
html_export_task054.escape_function: escapeHtml() using DOM textContent→innerHTML pattern — all PDF-extracted text escaped before HTML insertion.
html_export_task054.innerHTML_usage: 1 usage in escapeHtml helper only — all HTML built with escaped interpolation.
html_export_task054.data_uri_images: Page fallback images rendered via canvas.toDataURL('image/png') — generated internally, safe.
html_export_task054.batch_processing: Yields to UI every 10 pages via setTimeout(0).
html_export_task054.jszip_integration: Uses JSZip for multi-file export — library self-hosted.

form_data_task055.feature: TASK-055: Form data import/export (JSON/CSV/XML/FDF/XFDF), batch fill from spreadsheet, template management.
form_data_task055.escape_function: escHtml() using DOM textContent→innerHTML pattern — all user/PDF field data escaped.
form_data_task055.innerHTML_usage: 10 usages — 3 clearing (= ''), 1 static string, 6 with escaped content via escHtml(). All safe.
form_data_task055.import_parsing: Supports JSON/CSV/XML/FDF/XFDF parsers. JSON.parse, DOMParser.parseFromString, regex-based FDF parsing — none execute user code.
form_data_task055.file_validation: Import files read as text only, no binary execution.
form_data_task055.template_storage: Templates saved to localStorage via JSON.stringify — no code execution.
form_data_task055.escHtml_attribute_context: escHtml() used in double-quoted attribute contexts (option value=, data-col=) but does not escape double quotes. Same pattern as other modules. CSP script-src 'self' prevents inline handler injection. LOW priority.
form_data_task055.setFormFieldValues_validation: forms.js setFormFieldValues() called by form-data.js applyImport() which pre-validates: maxLen truncation, boolean parsing, dropdown option checking. form-data.js handles validation before passing to forms.js. Acceptable.

forms_js_update.changes: Added getFormFields() and setFormFieldValues() exports for TASK-055 integration.
forms_js_update.getFormFields: Returns internal formState.fields array — read-only export of field data. No security concern.
forms_js_update.setFormFieldValues: Accepts [{name, value}] array. Sets field values directly. No HTML rendering of values — values go to PDF form fields only. Caller (form-data.js) validates inputs. Safe.
forms_js_update.svg_innerHTML: forms.js line 305 svg.innerHTML = paths — hardcoded SVG path strings from switch statement. Safe.

known_issues: server_tokens set to 'build' - leaks nginx version (nginx/1.26.3 Ubuntu) in Server header. Should be 'off'.
No general *.md nginx block - only CLAUDE.md specifically blocked. Any new .md file added to webroot would be publicly accessible.
UFW firewall is inactive - only SSH and HTTP/HTTPS ports are needed but no firewall enforces this.
disable_symlinks off in nginx config - low risk since only novakj can write to webroot.
CGI location block exists in nginx but no CGI scripts present - dead config that could be removed.
Codex proxy at /codex returns 502 - backend not running. No security risk but dead endpoint.

merge.js, batch.js, hyperlinks.js, bates.js, command-palette.js, keyboard-shortcuts.js, form-data.js use escapeHtml()/escHtml() that does not escape double quotes. CSP script-src 'self' mitigates inline handler injection. In most files used in element content (safe). In attribute contexts (title/aria-label/value/data-col) should add escapeAttr().

hyperlinks.js: detected PDF link URLs not validated for protocol scheme. A malicious PDF could contain javascript: URIs in link annotations. CSP + noopener/noreferrer mitigate. Should add protocol allowlist (http/https/mailto) before window.open().
hyperlinks.js line 686: email link window.open() missing noopener/noreferrer — minor since mailto: links are low risk.
img2pdf.js image validation uses OR logic (MIME type OR extension) - slightly permissive but acceptable for client-side processing.
insert-pages.js has dead code: escapeHtml() function defined but never called.
metadata.js has dead code: escapeHtml() function defined but never called.
batch.js line 294: escapeHtml() used with textContent causes double-escaping — cosmetic display bug for filenames containing &, <, >.
keyboard-shortcuts.js line 395: document.write used on new popup window for print cheat sheet — acceptable pattern but noted for tracking.
headers-footers.js: custom preset names from prompt() not length-limited before localStorage storage — minor, only affects local storage size.
form-data.js: template names from prompt() not length-limited before localStorage storage — minor, same pattern as headers-footers.js.

Session restore (TASK-036): restoreNotes/restoreAnnotations/restoreDrawings/restoreSignatures/restoreFormValues do not validate data schema from IndexedDB. IndexedDB is same-origin so risk is self-XSS only. Low priority.
notes: Security review completed — 95 checks passed, 0 fixes needed this run.

REVIEWED: TASK-054 html-export.js (688 lines). Converts PDF pages to HTML via text extraction or image fallback. All text escaped with escapeHtml(). Uses data URIs from canvas.toDataURL(). Supports reflow/fixed layout, themes, multi-file ZIP export. No eval, no external requests, sanitized filenames. SECURE.

REVIEWED: TASK-055 form-data.js (908 lines). Form data import/export in 5 formats (JSON/CSV/XML/FDF/XFDF). Batch fill from CSV/JSON with 500-record limit. Template management via localStorage. All user data escaped with escHtml(). Import parsers don't execute code. Pre-validates values before setting form fields. SECURE.

REVIEWED: forms.js update — added getFormFields() and setFormFieldValues() exports for TASK-055 integration. getFormFields returns read-only field data. setFormFieldValues accepts validated input from form-data.js. No new HTML rendering of field values. SECURE.
JS file count: 55 (up from 53, +2 new modules: html-export.js, form-data.js).
innerHTML count: 157 across 41 files (up from 145/39 — 12 new from form-data.js/html-export.js, all safe).
SSH: fail2ban total bans 5931 (+61 since last review). 15 IPs currently banned (up from 3). 6 currently failed attempts. Only authorized activity from novakj.
SSL certificate valid until June 18, 2026 (75 days remaining).
All security headers confirmed in HTTP response. Nginx blocking rules verified (git/env/CLAUDE.md/sh/traversal all return 404).
recommendations: MEDIUM-LOW: Add protocol allowlist to hyperlinks.js handleLinkClick() — only allow http:, https:, mailto: schemes before calling window.open() on detected PDF links
LOW: Add escapeAttr() function to merge.js, batch.js, hyperlinks.js, bates.js, command-palette.js, keyboard-shortcuts.js, form-data.js for attribute contexts instead of escapeHtml()/escHtml()
LOW: Fix batch.js line 294 — use fileName directly with textContent instead of escapeHtml(fileName)
LOW: Set server_tokens off in nginx.conf to stop leaking version info (currently exposes nginx/1.26.3)
LOW: Enable UFW firewall (sudo ufw allow 22,80,443/tcp && sudo ufw enable)
LOW: Add general *.md deny rule to nginx with explicit exception for known safe files
LOW: Remove dead escapeHtml() function from insert-pages.js and metadata.js
LOW: Remove unused CGI location block from nginx config
LOW: Consider disable_symlinks on in nginx for defense in depth
LOW: Add length limit to custom preset names in headers-footers.js saveCustomPreset() and form-data.js saveTemplate()
LOW: Add basic type/schema validation in session restore functions for defense in depth
